title: Advantage rerolls one of your dice rolls and chooses a result

card.rawText: On any of your Dice Rolls, play this card from your hand. You may re-roll and choose 1 of the two results.

effect.target: Target / controller as specified by card text
effect.value: On any of your Dice Rolls, play this card from your hand. You may re-roll and choose 1 of the two results.

plan.title: Advantage rerolls one of your dice rolls and chooses a result
plan.summary: Play Advantage from hand on a dice roll and verify the reroll/choose route is represented.

notes: Read text first: On any of your Dice Rolls, play this card from your hand. You may re-roll and choose 1 of the two results.

steps: Reroll and choose one of the two results.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Play Advantage from hand on a dice roll and verify the reroll/choose route is represented.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
